theme_prompt: Project art direction for Quick Draw: a casual mobile 2D action game about a tiny sky courier swordsman slicing through floating enchanted ink targets while climbing upward through a bright paper-lantern sky. Fixed visual style: polished 2D casual mobile character art, cute heroic proportions, oversized head and hands, compact body, readable silhouette at 64-128 px, clean vector-like shapes, soft cel shading, subtle rim light, expressive face, rounded forms, energetic slash poses, high color contrast, teal/coral/gold accents, warm twilight sky palette, playful but action-focused tone. Avoid realism, gore, horror, gritty samurai violence, excessive detail, noisy textures, dark cyberpunk neon, and text in the image.

casual_2d_player_character.description: Main playable character concept art for the fixed casual mobile 2D style.
casual_2d_player_character.prompt: Create one full-body playable hero character for a casual mobile game. Character must read clearly as a tiny battoujutsu sky courier swordsman: cute compact proportions, expressive face, short scarf or sash, simple travel outfit, sheathed non-threatening charm katana, one hand on the scabbard and one hand ready to draw, dynamic iai quick-draw dash pose, clean silhouette, game-sprite friendly details, no background text. Keep the design suitable for later Flame sprite use.

main_hero_battoujutsu_base.description: Base protagonist design: a casual mobile 2D battoujutsu quick-draw hero for the player character.
main_hero_battoujutsu_base.prompt: Create the base protagonist character for a casual mobile 2D action game. The hero is a tiny battoujutsu sky courier named Nori. Full-body character concept, readable at 64-128 px, compact cute heroic proportions, oversized head and hands, focused cheerful eyes, short teal hair tuft, coral scarf flowing as the motion accent, cream courier coat, gold toggle buttons, navy shorts or hakama-inspired cropped pants, oversized boots, fingerless gloves, and a small sheathed charm katana. Pose: iai quick-draw stance, knees bent, torso angled forward, left hand gripping the scabbard at the waist, right hand just touching the sword hilt, scarf and coat tails lifted as if about to dash. Mood: playful, brave, fast, non-gory, non-realistic. Clean vector-like shapes, soft cel shading, crisp silhouette, no text, no logo, no UI, no background clutter.

casual_2d_target_character.description: Friendly slashable target/object concepts that match the fixed character style.
casual_2d_target_character.prompt: Create a slashable floating target object/creature that fits the same casual mobile 2D style. It should feel magical and harmless: enchanted ink blob, lantern wisp, or floating charm, round readable silhouette, bright teal/coral/gold accents, clear hit-state visual potential, no scary or realistic details, no text.

casual_2d_hazard_character.description: Obstacle/hazard concepts matching the fixed casual mobile 2D style.
casual_2d_hazard_character.prompt: Create a floating obstacle/hazard for a casual mobile action game. It should read as dangerous at small size but stay cute and non-gory: paper storm knot, angry lantern spark, or ink thorn charm, orange/coral warning accents, rounded shape language, readable silhouette, no horror, no text.

ultimate_slash_effect.description: Transparent/chroma-key VFX source art for the bonus-triggered ultimate sword slash effect.
ultimate_slash_effect.prompt: Create a standalone 2D game VFX source image, not a character and not an icon. The effect is an ultimate battoujutsu sword slash called Sky Cleave: a wide crescent sword arc with layered teal-white blade energy, coral spark accents, small gold paper-lantern motes, and a brief ink-brush edge. Keep the silhouette readable for mobile gameplay, centered with generous padding, no text, no UI, no logo, no gore, no weapon body, no character. The asset must be suitable for chroma-key video animation and later PNG frame extraction.

ultimate_rising_slash_effect.description: Vertical 9:16 VFX source art for the bonus-triggered upward ultimate slash effect.
ultimate_rising_slash_effect.prompt: Create a standalone 2D game VFX source image for Quick Draw, not a character and not an icon. The effect is an upward battoujutsu slash called Rising Sky Cleave: a vertical lower-to-upper sword arc with a bright white blade core, warm gold and coral energy ribbon, small teal accents, and tiny paper-lantern sparks. Match the current game style: polished anime/casual mobile 2D, bright sky-action palette, clean cel-shaded shapes, readable at mobile scale. Use a vertical composition. No text, no UI, no logo, no gore, no character, no sword handle. Suitable for chroma-key video animation and PNG frame extraction.

ultimate_dragon_rising_slash_effect.description: Vertical 9:16 VFX source art for a flashy dragon-rising bonus ultimate slash effect.
ultimate_dragon_rising_slash_effect.prompt: Create a standalone Quick Draw 2D game VFX source image, not a character and not an icon. The effect is a dragon-rising upward slash: a radiant gold and coral energy dragon ascending from the bottom in an S-shaped path, with a bright white sword-cut core through the dragon body, small teal highlights, paper-lantern sparks, a readable dragon head with horns and whiskers near the top, and a glowing impact flare at the bottom. Match the current game style: polished anime/casual mobile 2D, bright sky-action palette, clean cel-shaded shapes, readable at mobile scale. Use vertical 9:16 composition. No text, no UI, no logo, no gore, no character, no sword handle. Suitable for chroma-key video animation and PNG frame extraction.

ultimate_rising_straight_slash_effect.description: Vertical portrait video VFX for a game sword slash effect: a bottom-to-top rising straight slash, no dragon or creature motifs.
ultimate_rising_straight_slash_effect.prompt: Create a standalone vertical 9:16 game sword-slash VFX video concept for Quick Draw. This is explicitly for use as an in-game sword slash effect video, not illustration, not character art, not a dragon, not a creature, not an icon. The effect is a bottom-to-top rising straight slash: a mostly vertical single cut line from lower screen to upper screen, with layered complex energy ribbons and curved secondary streaks around the main straight slash. Bright white blade core, warm gold/coral energy edges, small teal highlights, paper-lantern sparks, clean anime/casual mobile 2D style matching the current game. No character, no sword handle, no dragon, no animal, no face, no text, no UI, no logo, no gore. Use vertical portrait composition and a flat chroma-key background for frame extraction.

ultimate_slash_effect.motion_prompt: Animate a short 2D casual mobile game ultimate sword slash VFX. Start with a tight bright point at the left-lower side, then sweep rapidly into a broad diagonal crescent arc toward the upper-right, expanding into layered teal-white blade energy with coral sparks and tiny gold paper motes. The slash should bloom at the middle, then dissipate into clean fading particles. Keep the camera locked, the effect centered, no character, no text, no UI, no gore. Use a perfectly flat solid chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, or lighting variation. Do not let the chroma-key color appear inside the effect.
ultimate_slash_effect.prompt:
Create a short 2D sprite animation video from the supplied starting image.
Preserve the exact character identity, costume, palette, proportions, silhouette, and camera scale from the input image.
Keep the character fully visible, centered, and readable for frame extraction.
Sprite type motion: Animate a short 2D casual mobile game ultimate sword slash VFX. Start with a tight bright point at the left-lower side, then sweep rapidly into a broad diagonal crescent arc toward the upper-right, expanding into layered teal-white blade energy with coral sparks and tiny gold paper motes. The slash should bloom at the middle, then dissipate into clean fading particles. Keep the camera locked, the effect centered, no character, no text, no UI, no gore. Use a perfectly flat solid chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, or lighting variation. Do not let the chroma-key color appear inside the effect.
Use a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for every frame. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the character, prop, clothing, effects, shadows, or antialiasing. No gradients, texture, floor plane, cast shadow, contact shadow, glow halo, particles, or lighting variation in the background.
No text, no logo, no UI, no duplicate character, no scene cuts.
ultimate_slash_effect.notes: Use for the bonus-collected ultimate Sky Cleave slash effect. Extracted frames should be composited in-game over gameplay.

ultimate_rising_slash_effect.motion_prompt: Animate a short vertical 9:16 Quick Draw ultimate slash VFX. The slash begins as a bright impact flare near the bottom center, then cuts upward in one fast battoujutsu motion, following a tall slightly curved arc from lower-left/bottom-center toward upper-right. The effect should bloom into a white blade core with warm gold/coral energy, small teal highlights, and paper-lantern sparks, then fade upward into particles. Match the game's existing polished casual anime 2D style and warm sky-action palette. Camera locked, effect-only, no character, no sword handle, no text, no UI, no gore. Use a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background in every frame and do not use #00ff00 inside the effect.

ultimate_dragon_rising_slash_effect.motion_prompt: Animate a short vertical 9:16 Quick Draw ultimate slash VFX. The slash begins as a bright circular impact flare near the bottom, then a radiant gold/coral energy dragon erupts upward, spiraling in an S-shaped ascent like a dragon flying into the sky. The dragon must read as a creature, not an arrow: preserve a rounded dragon head, visible red eye, horns, whiskers, flame-like dorsal fins, and a flowing serpentine body. The dragon body must also read as a sword slash with a white blade core through the center, warm gold/coral energy edges, tiny teal accents, and paper-lantern sparks. Make it flashy and magical but still clean casual mobile 2D, matching the existing bright sky-action game style. Camera locked, effect-only, no character, no sword handle, no text, no UI, no gore. Use a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background in every frame and do not use #00ff00 inside the effect.

ultimate_rising_straight_slash_effect.motion_prompt: Generate a vertical 9:16 video intended specifically as an in-game sword slash VFX for Quick Draw. Do not create a dragon, creature, animal, face, character, or sword handle. The effect starts with an empty flat chroma-key screen, then a bottom impact spark appears near the lower center and a single mostly straight vertical slash cuts rapidly upward to the top. The main slash should be a bright white blade core with warm gold/coral edges. Around it, add complex curved secondary energy streaks, thin afterimage ribbons, teal accent glints, and paper-lantern sparks, but keep the main read as one bottom-to-top straight rising slash. Clean polished anime/casual mobile 2D game VFX style, readable at mobile scale. Camera locked, no text, no UI, no logo, no gore. Use a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background in every frame and do not use #00ff00 inside the effect.
